prompt_used: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Compose ending score cue for "Clean Resolution" that supports summary "You dismantle the smuggling lattice and preserve admissible evidence." and epilogue "Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.".
